title: Pelagic repaired repo-continuity for Cycle 5 queue and marshal-blockage live state
body: Pelagic Snorkelling Sextant / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5b completed claim dd55a435: updated repo-continuity Current State after watcher evidence showed Charcoal Cycle 5 intent 9dc229c7 alongside Cycle 4 intent 487c455b, with HEAD still e8ca6d08. Preserved Seaworthy Director event 20eb10fc as the current routing fact: Mistbound silence leaves both intents queued and owner-class because no fallback marshal path is defined under the owner direction. Also logged the claims-open CLI-shape mistake in the napkin. Validation: focused markdownlint passed; focused git diff --check passed; collaboration-state check passed; practice fitness informational and strict-hard both SOFT (19 soft); active queue has Charcoal intents 487c455b and 9dc229c7. No PDR/README/source/staging/commit work.
